Parties / Context: Federal govt vs. Fano (Amhara) militias, OLA (Oromo); post-Tigray-war instability.cnn
Status & Assessment: 6,316 deaths in 2025.cnn Assessment: Post-Tigray peace did not bring stability — conflict metastasized to Amhara and Oromia. High risk of renewed large-scale war; Tigray tensions could reignite. A fragile giant.

Parties / Context: Iranian state vs. Kurdish (PJAK), Baloch, Arab insurgents — surging amid the Iran war.cnn
Status & Assessment: 7,015+ deaths in 2026 (vs. 63 in 2025) — explosive jump.cnn Assessment: The Iran war + Khamenei's death has cracked internal control; ethnic insurgencies are exploiting the vacuum. If the regime weakens further, Iran faces a genuine fragmentation/civil-conflict scenario. One of the most dynamic situations to watch.

Parties / Context: Houthis vs. govt + Saudi coalition; fused into Red Sea/Israel front.cnn
Status & Assessment: 2,895 deaths in 2025.cnn Assessment: Frozen-ish on the ground but the Houthis are now a regional actor via Red Sea attacks tied to the Israel/Iran war. De facto Houthi control of the north persists.

Parties / Context: New govt vs. ISIS remnants, SDF/Kurds, Druze; Turkish & Israeli interventions.cnn
Status & Assessment: 8,330–8,600+ deaths in 2025.cnn Assessment: Assad's fall did not end the war — it reshuffled it. SDF-government clashes, Druze insurgency, Israeli invasion of southern Syria, and Turkish-Kurdish fighting keep it hot. Fragile transition; partition pressures remain.

Parties / Context: Taliban govt vs. ISIS-K, anti-Taliban resistance; 2026 Afghan–Pakistani war.cnn
Status & Assessment: 4,409 deaths in 2025.cnn Assessment: A new interstate dimension — Afghanistan-Pakistan border war in 2026 — is the key escalation. TTP sanctuary in Afghanistan drives Pakistani strikes. Risk of sustained interstate conflict between two nuclear-adjacent states.

Parties / Context: Boko Haram/ISWAP, herder-farmer, banditry, Biafran separatism.cnn
Status & Assessment: 3,200 deaths in 2025.cnn Assessment: Multi-front chronic insecurity; no single resolution. Banditry in the northwest now rivals jihadism in lethality.
